creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
sylvio      2009-12-02 22:54:55 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    comms/gammu-devel    Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
  Log:
  Gammu (Gnu All Mobile Management Utilities) (development release)
  Gammu allows you to manage your mobile phone directly from your PC.
  It has many features, such as SMS handling, Calendar, Java support,
  ringtones, pictures and many, many other good things.
  
  WWW: http://www.gammu.org/wiki/index.php?title=Gammu:Main_Page
  
  PR:             ports/139659
  Submitted by:   myself (sylvio@)
  Approved by:    itetcu (mentor)
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.53      +9 -8      ports/comms/gammu-devel/Makefile
  1.32      +3 -3      ports/comms/gammu-devel/distinfo
  1.5       +1 -1      ports/comms/gammu-devel/pkg-descr
